prompt: [FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a compact cobalt-blue ceramic teapot shaped like a seated fox, with a matte white tail-shaped handle, a copper-colored spout tip, three tiny gold stars on its chest, and a square black lid knob.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, eye level; show the fox face, star markings, copper spout tip, and tail handle; [TOP-RIGHT] Right side, eye level; show the pointed snout profile, curved spout, square lid knob, and handle attachment; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear, slightly high angle; show the white tail handle, lid, blue glazed back, and four small feet; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same face, stars, copper tip, square knob, and compact body.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a walnut desk clock shaped like a friendly robot, with a cream circular dial, teal hour markers, two brushed-brass antennae, orange mitten-shaped hands at its sides, and short black rubber feet.; [TOP-LEFT] Front, eye level; show the cream dial, teal markers, orange side hands, brass antennae, and both feet; [TOP-RIGHT] Left side, eye level; show the clock depth, one orange hand, antenna profile, walnut grain, and rear adjustment knob; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear-left three-quarter, slightly high angle; show the walnut back panel, brass winding key, battery door, antennae, and rubber feet; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same dial, teal markers, orange hands, antennae, and walnut body.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a translucent emerald-green glass lantern shaped like a branching cactus, with a warm amber light chamber, a braided red carrying loop, six raised white dot accents, and a hexagonal bronze base.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, eye level; show both cactus arms, amber chamber, white dots, red loop, and bronze base; [TOP-RIGHT] Right side, eye level; show the narrow cactus profile, glass thickness, loop attachment, and hexagonal base; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear, slightly high angle; show the rear glass seam, red braided loop, light access hatch, white dots, and bronze base; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same cactus silhouette, amber chamber, six white dots, loop, and bronze base.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a portable radio shaped like a navy felt whale, with a pale gray speaker belly, a coral-red dorsal fin, two lime-green tuning knobs, a stitched white eye, and a short tan leather strap.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, eye level; show the speaker belly, stitched eye, red fin, green knobs, and leather strap; [TOP-RIGHT] Right side, eye level; show the whale profile, tail, fin, one knob, felt texture, and strap anchor; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear-right three-quarter, slightly high angle; show the battery panel, tan strap, tail seam, red fin, and navy felt back; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front, low angle; show the same gray speaker belly, white eye, paired green knobs, red fin, and whale silhouette.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a palm-sized brushed-brass jewelry case shaped like a beetle, with turquoise enamel wing panels, a thin magenta center stripe, six dark wooden legs, and a small moon-shaped latch.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, slightly high angle; show both enamel wings, magenta stripe, moon latch, brass head, and six legs; [TOP-RIGHT] Left side, eye level; show the domed shell, wooden legs, wing edge, head, and latch profile; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear, slightly high angle; show the brass hinge, turquoise wing panels, magenta stripe, rear legs, and shell curvature; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same moon latch, turquoise panels, stripe, brass body, and all visible wooden legs.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a soft-sided mustard-yellow canvas toolbox styled as an octopus, with eight short padded legs, a charcoal zipper mouth, two mismatched button eyes—one blue and one red—and a striped purple carry handle.; [TOP-LEFT] Front, eye level; show both button eyes, zipper mouth, purple handle, yellow canvas body, and eight padded legs; [TOP-RIGHT] Left side, eye level; show the side pocket, leg spacing, zipper track, one eye, and handle attachment; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear-left three-quarter, slightly high angle; show the rear mesh pocket, striped handle, canvas seams, and padded legs; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same mismatched eyes, charcoal mouth, purple handle, mustard body, and octopus legs.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a small speaker shaped like a snail, with a white marble body, a spiral shell of translucent violet acrylic, a perforated silver speaker grille, two flexible yellow antennae, and a mint-green charging port cover.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, eye level; show the marble head, yellow antennae, violet spiral shell, silver grille, and charging cover; [TOP-RIGHT] Right side, eye level; show the complete shell spiral, grille perforations, marble foot, antenna profile, and mint cover; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear-right three-quarter, slightly high angle; show the power button, cable socket, violet shell edge, rear grille, and antennae; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front, low angle; show the same marble face, paired yellow antennae, violet shell, silver grille, and mint-green detail.

[FOUR-VIEWS] Four views of a slender bamboo vase carved as a standing heron, with a coral-pink beak, an indigo woven neck band, three black feather chevrons on each side, and a round jade-green base.; [TOP-LEFT] Front-left three-quarter, eye level; show the heron head, coral beak, indigo band, side chevrons, bamboo grain, and green base; [TOP-RIGHT] Right side, eye level; show the long neck profile, pointed beak, three feather marks, slim body, and circular base; [BOTTOM-LEFT] Rear, slightly high angle; show the rear neck opening, woven band knot, bamboo grain, back contour, and jade base; [BOTTOM-RIGHT] Front-right three-quarter, low angle; show the same coral beak, indigo band, six total side chevrons, bamboo body, and green base.
